name: Anne's Favorite Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 3-quart Pyrex pan.
3. Soak matzos in water and drain well.
4. Mix drained matzos with oil, sugar, cinnamon, apricot preserves, and white raisins.
5. Fold in egg whites.
6. Pour half of the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Layer apricot preserves in the center.
8. Pour the remaining mixture on top.
9. Bake for 1 hour or until brown.
